compiled_state.author: Claude

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body:
COMPLETED. Documented session_log across the agent-facing docs, cross-checked against the shipped stories (add5/7657/1368/e2e3/e7e4):
- CLAUDE.md: added recent_session_logs to Reads and log_session to Writes; new '## Session logs' section (gate/lifecycle-exempt, searchable-but-hidden-from-list, graph/health-excluded, non-blocking-links-only, Jira-excluded, title-summary convention 'not enforced', + the capture helper + recent-logs usage across lib/CLI/MCP); added a session_log row to the ticket-type matrix noting gate exemption.
- docs/architecture.md: documented the reduce_all_tickets(exclude_session_logs=…) compile-exclusion seam on the Reducer bullet, and the Graph exclusion (with deps-on-a-log-still-resolves note).
- docs/event-schema.md: CREATE row now lists the valid ticket_type enum incl. session_log + its rules; LINK row notes session_log refuses blocks/depends_on but allows relates_to/discovered_from.
- docs/output-schemas.md: added session-logs to the always-JSON reads, the profile line, and the ticket_state/ticket_state_llm rows.

No test parses these docs for assertions; docs-only change.

compiled_state.description:
Document the `session_log` ticket type, its exemptions, and the title-summary
convention across the agent-facing docs.

## Why

Agents discover behavior through `CLAUDE.md` and `docs/`. The new type, its
gate/lifecycle exemptions, its query-visibility rules, and the (unenforced)
title-summary convention must be written down so agents use it correctly.

## What

- Update `CLAUDE.md`: add `session_log` to the MCP/CLI tool descriptions and the
  ticket-type matrix, noting it is gate/lifecycle-exempt, non-blocking-links-only,
  Jira-excluded, searchable-but-hidden-from-`list`, and that titles should carry a
  short work summary (guidance, not enforced).
- Update `docs/architecture.md` and `docs/event-schema.md` for the type and the
  graph/health compile-exclusion seam.
- Update `docs/output-schemas.md` for the recent-logs tool's `outputSchema`.

## Scope

Documentation only.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` describes `session_log`, its exemptions, visibility, Jira
      exclusion, and the title-summary convention (explicitly "not enforced").
- [ ] `docs/architecture.md` / `docs/event-schema.md` cover the type and the
      compile-exclusion seam.
- [ ] `docs/output-schemas.md` documents the recent-logs output shape.
- [ ] Docs match the shipped behavior (cross-checked against the other stories).
compiled_state.title: Document session_log type, exemptions, and title-summary convention
